resources.string: Select and copy text from any image.\nEverything runs on this device — no internet, no Google services.
Tip: share any image to TextGrab, or add the "OCR screenshot" tile to your quick settings — take a screenshot, tap the tile, select the text.

Lets the OCR screenshot tile capture the screen by itself, so one tap on the tile is enough. TextGrab only takes a screenshot when you tap the tile. It does not read screen content, does not observe your input and has no internet access.
Screen capture failed, opening latest screenshot instead
No text found in this image
Photo access is needed to open your latest screenshot
